description_long: This is a compact, modern bullpup-style rifle with a matte black finish and a distinctive integrated magazine running along the top of the receiver. The body is constructed primarily from metal and polymer, featuring a large trigger guard and ergonomic thumbhole grip for improved handling. The rifle's magazine is translucent, allowing visibility of the ammunition inside, and is positioned horizontally above the main body. The sighting system appears to be a set of integrated iron sights, and the barrel is short, ending with a simple muzzle. The overall design is sleek and utilitarian, optimized for close-quarters urban environments. The rifle's surfaces are mostly smooth with some matte and slightly textured areas for grip.
description: A compact, matte black bullpup rifle with a top-mounted translucent magazine and integrated iron sights. Its ergonomic design and short barrel make it suitable for urban use.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the rifle, the translucent top-mounted magazine, and the ergonomic thumbhole grip.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the barrel opening, front sight, and the compact width of the rifle.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the magazine, grip, and the overall bullpup configuration.
description_view_3: Rear view showing the back of the magazine, rear sight, and the rifle's compact profile.
